decisions.rationale: IR re-read confirms chat uses a distinct wrapper ai_RNbBHXSM parent of card ai_RNbBHXSN, while journal card ai_RNbBHXSx is the Group_card_ root with parent_id ai_RNbBHXRW — no separate slot element in Bubble. routes.ts maps DASHBOARD_JOURNAL_PREVIEW_SLOT_BUBBLE_ID to ai_RNbBHXSx, so DashboardMain DashboardSlot and DashboardJournalPreviewCard both emit the same data-bubble-id, yielding partial ui_evidence. Valid parity-tooling finding, but AC-2 requires the card-root marker on ai_RNbBHXSx and criteria_audit/ui_evidence for all other named journal ui_refs pass; visual layout and routing are correct. One-line fix (transparent journal slot wrapper without data-bubble-id, mirroring chat's ai_RNbBHXSM/ai_RNbBHXSN split) is optional DASH-06 cleanup — mirrors DASH-02 C-1 intermediate-wrapper deferral; no downstream item lists DASH-06 in depends_on.

IR inventory pointer order under bTIXu confirms journal-card-header ai_RNbBHXSy (ai_RNbBHXVZ) precedes empty-state text bTIXy (bTIYA), then RG ai_RNbBHXTD (ai_RNbBHXVe); implementation renders bTIXy above ai_RNbBHXSy when entries.length === 0. Valid hierarchy reorder for empty-state visibility, but DASH-06 AC-2 scopes required markers to ai_RNbBHXSx header/link/RG cells — not bTIXy child order. Header, link, RG cells, and empty copy all render with correct markers and copy; FV-5 passes. Mirrors DASH-04 C-1 mood-group reorder deferral: strict Bubble sibling order polish with no downstream depends_on impact.

Valid functional gap in brownfield fallback path: when chatmessage/chatconversation tables are absent and profiles.onboarding_data has no chat_preview or chat_messages seed, fetchChatPreview returns hardcoded DEFAULT_LAST_MESSAGE. However DASH-06 AC-3 requires Supabase client read with Bubble binding parity; coverage preflight documents prototype-schema gap (reuse_decision gap-fill) and chatPreviewApi implements best-effort table queries then onboarding_data fallback — same interim pattern as DASH-04 daily check-in. criteria_audit AC-3 and FV-4 pass with documented gap; live session-local chat history cannot surface until CHAT-05-chat-messaging-and-create-flow wires chatmessage inserts. Defer table-path QA and live-preview surfacing to CHAT-05 wave.

Valid schema-dependency note: journal preview is end-to-end wired to journal_entries with RLS (FV-5 pass), while chatmessage/chatconversation tables remain absent from supabase migrations so the table query path is untested. DASH-06 scope is read-only dashboard previews with Supabase read parity; landing chat tables and exercising the insert/select path is explicitly owned by CHAT-05 (chatMessagesApi inserts, new conversation flow). onboarding_data fallback satisfies AC-3 in the current brownfield schema per review criteria_audit; mirrors DASH-03 C-2 and DASH-04 C-4 schema deferrals. DASH-07 and other dashboard widgets depend on card mount and routing already delivered, not provisioned chat tables.

summary: 0 fix_now, 4 defer, 0 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, functional_ok=true, no blockers, all ACs and functional checks pass. Deferred: C-1 duplicate ai_RNbBHXSx slot wrapper (optional DASH-06 parity cleanup); C-2 bTIXy empty-state sibling order (ui-fidelity polish); C-3 live chat preview via chatmessage tables and DEFAULT_LAST_MESSAGE fallback hardening to CHAT-05; C-4 chatmessage/chatconversation migration and table-path QA to CHAT-05.
